### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto

Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1

X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/parsers/flow_tracker.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Reconstruct TCP flows keyed by 5-tuple; track bytes, RTT, concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _endpoint(ip: str, port: int) -> tuple[str, int]:\r\n    return (ip, port)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_key(\r\n    src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int\r\n) -> tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically for a unique flow key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _endpoint(src_ip, src_port)\r\n    b = _endpoint(dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    return (a, b) if a <= b else (b, a)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _FlowState:\r\n    \"\"\"Mutable state for one flow.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]\r\n    client_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    client_port: int = 0\r\n    server_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    server_port: int = 0\r\n    start_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    end_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    bytes_c2s: int = 0\r\n    bytes_s2c: int = 0\r\n    packets_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packets_s2c: int = 0\r\n    rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    syn_seen: bool = False\r\n    client_syn_ts: float | None = None  # ts of client's SYN for RTT\r\n    syn_ack_ts: float | None = None  # ts of server's SYN-ACK for RTT\r\n    initiator_seen: bool = False\r\n    segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]] = field(default_factory=list)  # ts, payload, \"c2s\"|\"s2c\", seq\r\n    last_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    fin_c2s: bool = False\r\n    fin_s2c: bool = False\r\n    rst: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def is_client_to_server(self, src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> bool:\r\n        return (src_ip, src_port) == (self.client_ip, self.client_port)\r\n\r\n    def add_packet(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        flags: int,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        from dpkt.tcp import TH_FIN, TH_RST, TH_SYN\r\n\r\n        self.last_ts = ts\r\n        self.end_ts = ts\r\n        if not self.start_ts:\r\n            self.start_ts = ts\r\n        c2s = self.is_client_to_server(src_ip, src_port)\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n                self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.client_port = src_port\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip  # will set from other side\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.initiator_seen:\r\n                self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts  # RTT = ts - client_syn_ts; we need to store client_syn_ts\r\n        if payload or (flags & TH_SYN):\r\n            self.segments.append((ts, payload, direction, tcp_seq))\r\n        if flags & TH_FIN:\r\n            if c2s:\r\n                self.fin_c2s = True\r\n            else:\r\n                self.fin_s2c = True\r\n        if flags & TH_RST:\r\n            self.rst = True\r\n\r\n    def is_closed(self) -> bool:\r\n        return self.rst or (self.fin_c2s and self.fin_s2c)\r\n\r\n    def duration_sec(self) -> float:\r\n        return self.end_ts - self.start_ts if self.start_ts else 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_ip_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> str:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[0]\r\n    return a[0]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_port_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> int:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[1]\r\n    return a[1]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _client_syn_ts(segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp of first c2s segment (client SYN or first data). Used for RTT.\"\"\"\r\n    for ts, _payload, direction, _seq in segments:\r\n        if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n            return ts\r\n    return None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FlowTracker:\r\n    \"\"\"Tracks active flows; yields Flow and segments when a flow closes or times out.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        capture_file_id: str,\r\n        flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = 60.0,\r\n        concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = 1.0,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        self.capture_file_id = capture_file_id\r\n        self.flow_idle_timeout_sec = flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        self.concurrency_bucket_seconds = concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._flows: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], _FlowState] = {}\r\n        self._client_syn_ts: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], float] = {}\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets: defaultdict[float, set[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]]] = (\r\n            defaultdict(set)\r\n        )\r\n        self._current_ts: float = 0.0\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_flow(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]) -> _FlowState:\r\n        if key not in self._flows:\r\n            self._flows[key] = _FlowState(key=key)\r\n        return self._flows[key]\r\n\r\n    def _update_concurrency(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], ts: float) -> None:\r\n        bucket = (ts // self.concurrency_bucket_seconds) * self.concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets[bucket].add(key)\r\n\r\n    def _get_concurrency_timeline(self) -> list[tuple[float, int]]:\r\n        return [(t, len(s)) for t, s in sorted(self._concurrency_buckets.items())]\r\n\r\n    def _build_flow_model(\r\n        self,\r\n        state: _FlowState,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None,\r\n    ) -> Flow:\r\n        duration = state.duration_sec()\r\n        rtt_ms = None\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts and state.key in self._client_syn_ts:\r\n            rtt_ms = (state.syn_ack_ts - self._client_syn_ts[state.key]) * 1000.0\r\n        return Flow(\r\n            flow_id=flow_id,\r\n            capture_file_id=self.capture_file_id,\r\n            src_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            src_port=state.client_port,\r\n            dst_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            dst_port=state.server_port,\r\n            protocol=6,\r\n            client_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            client_port=state.client_port,\r\n            server_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            server_port=state.server_port,\r\n            start_ts=state.start_ts,\r\n            end_ts=state.end_ts,\r\n            duration_sec=duration,\r\n            bytes_client_to_server=state.bytes_c2s,\r\n            bytes_server_to_client=state.bytes_s2c,\r\n            packet_count_c2s=state.packets_c2s,\r\n            packet_count_s2c=state.packets_s2c,\r\n            estimated_rtt_ms=rtt_ms,\r\n            concurrency_timeline=concurrency_timeline,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def ingest(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        dst_ip: str,\r\n        dst_port: int,\r\n        protocol: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        tcp_flags: int,\r\n    ) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Process one packet. Yields (Flow, segments) for each flow that just closed.\"\"\"\r\n        self._current_ts = ts\r\n        key = _normalize_key(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n        state = self._ensure_flow(key)\r\n\r\n        # Track client SYN ts for RTT (before add_packet so we can set it from first c2s segment)\r\n        if (state.client_ip, state.client_port) == (\"\", 0) and (src_ip, src_port) == key[0]:\r\n            # First packet from one side - we don't know client yet; will set after add_packet\r\n            pass\r\n        if not state.syn_seen and tcp_flags & 0x02:  # TH_SYN\r\n            if (src_ip, src_port) == key[0]:\r\n                self._client_syn_ts[key] = ts\r\n\r\n        state.add_packet(ts, src_ip, src_port, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n        self._update_concurrency(key, ts)\r\n\r\n        # If we just determined initiator and the other side sent SYN (SYN-ACK), store client syn ts\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts is not None and key not in self._client_syn_ts:\r\n            for seg_ts, _p, direction, _seq in state.segments:\r\n                if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n                    self._client_syn_ts[key] = seg_ts\r\n                    break\r\n\r\n        if state.is_closed():\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, protocol, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            timeline = self._get_concurrency_timeline()\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, timeline)\r\n            segments = state.segments\r\n            del self._flows[key]\r\n            self._client_syn_ts.pop(key, None)\r\n            yield (flow, segments)\r\n\r\n    def flush_idle(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Close flows that have been idle past flow_idle_timeout_sec. Yields (Flow, segments).\"\"\"\r\n        to_remove = [\r\n            k\r\n            for k, s in self._flows.items()\r\n            if self._current_ts - s.last_ts >= self.flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        ]\r\n        for key in to_remove:\r\n            state = self._flows.pop(key)\r\n            self._client_syn_ts.pop(key, None)\r\n            if not state.initiator_seen:\r\n                continue\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, 6, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, self._get_concurrency_timeline())\r\n            yield (flow, state.segments)\r\n            del state\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:03:00 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin

http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/parsers/flow_tracker.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Reconstruct TCP flows keyed by 5-tuple; track bytes, RTT, concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_flow_id\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _endpoint(ip: str, port: int) -> tuple[str, int]:\r\n    return (ip, port)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_key(\r\n    src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int\r\n) -> tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically for a unique flow key.\"\"\"\r\n    a = _endpoint(src_ip, src_port)\r\n    b = _endpoint(dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    return (a, b) if a <= b else (b, a)\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass _FlowState:\r\n    \"\"\"Mutable state for one flow.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]\r\n    client_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    client_port: int = 0\r\n    server_ip: str = \"\"\r\n    server_port: int = 0\r\n    start_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    end_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    bytes_c2s: int = 0\r\n    bytes_s2c: int = 0\r\n    packets_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packets_s2c: int = 0\r\n    rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    syn_seen: bool = False\r\n    client_syn_ts: float | None = None  # ts of client's SYN for RTT\r\n    syn_ack_ts: float | None = None  # ts of server's SYN-ACK for RTT\r\n    initiator_seen: bool = False\r\n    segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]] = field(default_factory=list)  # ts, payload, \"c2s\"|\"s2c\", seq\r\n    last_ts: float = 0.0\r\n    fin_c2s: bool = False\r\n    fin_s2c: bool = False\r\n    rst: bool = False\r\n\r\n    def is_client_to_server(self, src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> bool:\r\n        return (src_ip, src_port) == (self.client_ip, self.client_port)\r\n\r\n    def add_packet(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        flags: int,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        from dpkt.tcp import TH_FIN, TH_RST, TH_SYN\r\n\r\n        self.last_ts = ts\r\n        self.end_ts = ts\r\n        if not self.start_ts:\r\n            self.start_ts = ts\r\n        c2s = self.is_client_to_server(src_ip, src_port)\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n                self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.client_port = src_port\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip  # will set from other side\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.initiator_seen:\r\n                self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts  # RTT = ts - client_syn_ts; we need to store client_syn_ts\r\n        if payload or (flags & TH_SYN):\r\n            self.segments.append((ts, payload, direction, tcp_seq))\r\n        if flags & TH_FIN:\r\n            if c2s:\r\n                self.fin_c2s = True\r\n            else:\r\n                self.fin_s2c = True\r\n        if flags & TH_RST:\r\n            self.rst = True\r\n\r\n    def is_closed(self) -> bool:\r\n        return self.rst or (self.fin_c2s and self.fin_s2c)\r\n\r\n    def duration_sec(self) -> float:\r\n        return self.end_ts - self.start_ts if self.start_ts else 0.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_ip_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> str:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[0]\r\n    return a[0]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef dst_port_from_key(key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], src_ip: str, src_port: int) -> int:\r\n    (a, b) = key\r\n    if (src_ip, src_port) == a:\r\n        return b[1]\r\n    return a[1]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _client_syn_ts(segments: list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp of first c2s segment (client SYN or first data). Used for RTT.\"\"\"\r\n    for ts, _payload, direction, _seq in segments:\r\n        if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n            return ts\r\n    return None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FlowTracker:\r\n    \"\"\"Tracks active flows; yields Flow and segments when a flow closes or times out.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        capture_file_id: str,\r\n        flow_idle_timeout_sec: float = 60.0,\r\n        concurrency_bucket_seconds: float = 1.0,\r\n    ) -> None:\r\n        self.capture_file_id = capture_file_id\r\n        self.flow_idle_timeout_sec = flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        self.concurrency_bucket_seconds = concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._flows: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], _FlowState] = {}\r\n        self._client_syn_ts: dict[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], float] = {}\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets: defaultdict[float, set[tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]]] = (\r\n            defaultdict(set)\r\n        )\r\n        self._current_ts: float = 0.0\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_flow(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]]) -> _FlowState:\r\n        if key not in self._flows:\r\n            self._flows[key] = _FlowState(key=key)\r\n        return self._flows[key]\r\n\r\n    def _update_concurrency(self, key: tuple[tuple[str, int], tuple[str, int]], ts: float) -> None:\r\n        bucket = (ts // self.concurrency_bucket_seconds) * self.concurrency_bucket_seconds\r\n        self._concurrency_buckets[bucket].add(key)\r\n\r\n    def _get_concurrency_timeline(self) -> list[tuple[float, int]]:\r\n        return [(t, len(s)) for t, s in sorted(self._concurrency_buckets.items())]\r\n\r\n    def _build_flow_model(\r\n        self,\r\n        state: _FlowState,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None,\r\n    ) -> Flow:\r\n        duration = state.duration_sec()\r\n        rtt_ms = None\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts and state.key in self._client_syn_ts:\r\n            rtt_ms = (state.syn_ack_ts - self._client_syn_ts[state.key]) * 1000.0\r\n        return Flow(\r\n            flow_id=flow_id,\r\n            capture_file_id=self.capture_file_id,\r\n            src_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            src_port=state.client_port,\r\n            dst_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            dst_port=state.server_port,\r\n            protocol=6,\r\n            client_ip=state.client_ip,\r\n            client_port=state.client_port,\r\n            server_ip=state.server_ip,\r\n            server_port=state.server_port,\r\n            start_ts=state.start_ts,\r\n            end_ts=state.end_ts,\r\n            duration_sec=duration,\r\n            bytes_client_to_server=state.bytes_c2s,\r\n            bytes_server_to_client=state.bytes_s2c,\r\n            packet_count_c2s=state.packets_c2s,\r\n            packet_count_s2c=state.packets_s2c,\r\n            estimated_rtt_ms=rtt_ms,\r\n            concurrency_timeline=concurrency_timeline,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def ingest(\r\n        self,\r\n        ts: float,\r\n        src_ip: str,\r\n        src_port: int,\r\n        dst_ip: str,\r\n        dst_port: int,\r\n        protocol: int,\r\n        payload: bytes,\r\n        tcp_seq: int,\r\n        tcp_flags: int,\r\n    ) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Process one packet. Yields (Flow, segments) for each flow that just closed.\"\"\"\r\n        self._current_ts = ts\r\n        key = _normalize_key(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n        state = self._ensure_flow(key)\r\n\r\n        # Track client SYN ts for RTT (before add_packet so we can set it from first c2s segment)\r\n        if (state.client_ip, state.client_port) == (\"\", 0) and (src_ip, src_port) == key[0]:\r\n            # First packet from one side - we don't know client yet; will set after add_packet\r\n            pass\r\n        if not state.syn_seen and tcp_flags & 0x02:  # TH_SYN\r\n            if (src_ip, src_port) == key[0]:\r\n                self._client_syn_ts[key] = ts\r\n\r\n        state.add_packet(ts, src_ip, src_port, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n        self._update_concurrency(key, ts)\r\n\r\n        # If we just determined initiator and the other side sent SYN (SYN-ACK), store client syn ts\r\n        if state.syn_ack_ts is not None and key not in self._client_syn_ts:\r\n            for seg_ts, _p, direction, _seq in state.segments:\r\n                if direction == \"c2s\":\r\n                    self._client_syn_ts[key] = seg_ts\r\n                    break\r\n\r\n        if state.is_closed():\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, protocol, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            timeline = self._get_concurrency_timeline()\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, timeline)\r\n            segments = state.segments\r\n            del self._flows[key]\r\n            self._client_syn_ts.pop(key, None)\r\n            yield (flow, segments)\r\n\r\n    def flush_idle(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Flow, list[tuple[float, bytes, str, int]]]]:\r\n        \"\"\"Close flows that have been idle past flow_idle_timeout_sec. Yields (Flow, segments).\"\"\"\r\n        to_remove = [\r\n            k\r\n            for k, s in self._flows.items()\r\n            if self._current_ts - s.last_ts >= self.flow_idle_timeout_sec\r\n        ]\r\n        for key in to_remove:\r\n            state = self._flows.pop(key)\r\n            self._client_syn_ts.pop(key, None)\r\n            if not state.initiator_seen:\r\n                continue\r\n            flow_id = compute_flow_id(\r\n                state.client_ip, state.client_port, state.server_ip, state.server_port, 6, self.capture_file_id\r\n            )\r\n            flow = self._build_flow_model(state, flow_id, self._get_concurrency_timeline())\r\n            yield (flow, state.segments)\r\n            del state\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```

duration: 90ms
tags: captureMode=proxy, decoded=true, proxyProtocol=tcp:http, proxyType=dual, proxyVersion=v2.5.182, reverseProxyHost=localhost, reverseProxyPort=8080, sequence=1305, source=goproxy
